name: Dog And Goblin
short_description: Dog and Goblin is an auto-battler Roguelike deck-building strategy game where you assemble a mixed army to stand against humans. With nearly 150 units across 19 different types, build your ultimate army and conquer their castles!
detailed_description:
About us

To discuss more about Dog and Goblin, feel free to follow us and join our community:

Discord：


About the Game

Waking up, I realize I’m the villain?!

In this game, you're not a human hero anymore. Instead, you can freely assemble a mixed army of fighters, mages, beasts, demons, and more to destroy human castles and become the true "Demon King."

Hundreds of Units and Dozens of Playstyles to Mix and Match

The game currently features nearly 150 units, with gameplay inspired by inventory management and card synergies. For example, meat can boost a beast's attack power, and pairing hunters with beasts can provide a higher attack bonus.

You can also use imps summoned by warlocks to nourish the great demons, or have engineers build powerful crossbows. Almost every unit has a corresponding synergy, and there are dozens of playstyles waiting to be explored. Try different strategies to clear the game—you might find some unexpected surprises!

1+1 > 4? Outrageous Unit Synergies

The game's hundreds of units feature various mysterious synergies and chemical reactions, regardless of type or rarity. Goblin + Silver = Goblin Merchant, Goblin + Gold = Alchemist, Orc Infantry + Wolf = Wolf Rider. There are even more outrageous yet logical unit synergies waiting for you to discover!

Dog and Goblin: The Game That Will Steal Your Time

The game features auto-battler mechanics, requiring no complex controls. With hundreds of units, dozens of playstyles, and many unique unit synergies, you’ll find plenty to explore. The game also offers different characters, difficulty levels, and modes to choose from. Get ready to experience the thrill and excitement that this game brings!
